details.pattern: try/catch wrapping for 6 dedicated store IPC handlers
details.note: fix-A + fix-A-extended: All 6 handlers now have try/catch with console.error. Get handlers return safe defaults. Set handlers rethrow after logging.

details.pattern: try/catch wrapping for 6 dedicated store IPC handlers
details.note: fix-A + fix-A-extended: All 6 handlers wrapped in try/catch. Get handlers return safe defaults ([] or {configs:[], dropped:0}). Set handlers rethrow after logging.
fix-B: getDesktopPluginConfig() and setDesktopPluginConfig() now use ?.() with undefined guards

details.pattern: fresh state fetch + optional chaining + console.warn
details.note: fix-B: optional chaining on window.api calls; fix-C: toggleEnabled/removePlugin/submitInstall fetch fresh state from store; fix-E: console.warn in loadConfigs catch
fix-D: added .catch() handler to dynamic import of dialog-manage-plugins with console.error
